key_themes: Strong real-world, pediatric, and long-term efficacy/safety data for AUCATZYL (obe-cel) in B-ALL with high response rates and low severe CRS/ICANS
Commercial momentum with 2025 revenue ~$75M, 2026 guidance of $120-135M, center expansion (67 activated), and shift to positive gross margin
Significant analyst upside (avg PT ~$8.80–$10, Buy ratings from Needham/Deutsche Bank) versus current ~$1.60 share price
Pipeline expansion into frontline ALL, pediatric ALL, lupus, MS, and autoimmune diseases
Dilution concerns from recent share offerings/shelf filing amid ongoing losses in a volatile biotech sector
summary: Autolus Therapeutics is seeing positive momentum driven by encouraging real-world ROKA and pediatric data for its approved CAR-T AUCATZYL, showing ~95% early response rates, high MRD-negative remissions, and a favorable safety profile that supports frontline and broader use. Management is guiding for strong 2026 revenue growth, positive gross margins this year, and a path to improved cash flow, while analysts maintain Buy ratings with price targets implying over 5x upside from the current ~$1.60 level. Investor chatter on X and Reddit highlights undervaluation and CAR-T/autoimmune potential, tempered by dilution from recent offerings and typical biotech caution.
sources: 12+ recent news articles (Yahoo Finance, GlobeNewswire, MarketBeat, Seeking Alpha, company releases), 15–20 relevant X posts (March–April 2026, mostly low-moderate engagement), Multiple Reddit threads (primarily bullish on undervaluation from prior periods)
